title: Bundles To Briefcases
description: Turns bundles into briefcases with displayable 3D models
body:
**This pack replaces bundles with sleek new briefcases, each color with a unique design. They use 3d models when held or placed in an item frame. Otherwise they use 2d sprites.**

---

**The perfect pack for business majors and door-to-door shower curtain salesmen.**
